remarks: Welcome to this beautifully maintained end-unit townhouse in the desirable Chesterfield community. Offering approximately 1,550 sq. ft. above grade plus a finished lower level, this home combines comfort, flexibility, and an unbeatable location.  The open-concept living and dining area features hardwood floors, a cozy fireplace, and sliding doors leading to a private deck with peaceful, wooded views. The end-unit location provides added privacy and abundant natural light.  Upstairs you'll find a spacious primary suite, a generous second bedroom, and a versatile loft with two large closets-ideal for a home office, guest area, or flex space. The finished lower level offers additional living space perfect for a recreation room, playroom, gym, office, or storage.  Recent updates include newer refrigerator, dishwasher, washer and dryer, updated HVAC components, a new garage door with Genie opener, and a new garbage disposal.  Enjoy an attached one-car garage, private driveway, additional parking, two community pools, and a pet-friendly neighborhood. Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Stamford, Metro-North, I-95, the Merritt Parkway, Whole Foods, Stop & Shop, Starbucks, restaurants, shopping, and Bartlett Arboretum & Gardens
